name: ExtensionMolecularSequence_Formatted
title: R5: Embedded file or a link (URL) which contains content to represent the sequence (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MolecularSequence.formatted` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MolecularSequence.formatted` 0..* `Attachment`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MolecularSequence.formatted` 0..* `Attachment`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MolecularSequence.formatted` has a context of MolecularSequence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MolecularSequence`.
Element `MolecularSequence.formatted` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Embedded file or a link (URL) which contains content to represent the sequence (new)
element.comment:
Element `MolecularSequence.formatted` has a context of MolecularSequence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MolecularSequence`.
Element `MolecularSequence.formatted` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Embedded file or a link (URL) which contains content to represent the sequence
element.definition: Sequence that was observed as file content. Can be an actual file contents, or referenced by a URL to an external system.
